# Groove Music Store - SEO Configuration
# Allow search engines to crawl main public pages

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and personal account flows
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /cuenta
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /registro
Disallow: /checkout

# Disallow Firebase internal paths
Disallow: /__/
Disallow: /_/

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://groove-store.com/sitemap.xml
